text: I feel a peculiar sense of anticipation—a playful energy underlines the stillness of this modern space. The echoes of "vroom, vroom, vroom" vibrate in my mind like a child's imitation of engines pulsing through a quiet gallery. Surrounded by research and design, the juxtaposition of sound and setting inspires in me a questioning spirit: how do play and innovation propel society forward? I feel like a curious observer, drawn onward into possibility.
